expectations.desc: Writes the base concept to artifacts/<project>/01-concept.md (the phase-1 path) and nothing is rendered.
All 6 labelled sections are present (Subject, Composition, Style/Aesthetic, Color Palette, Typography, Mood/Atmosphere) and total >= 100 words.
The Color Palette lists 2-4 colors plus a neutral, each with a valid #RRGGBB hex code and a one-line rationale.

Typography names a wired font pack (modern/editorial/bold/tech) or a face from the wired nine (Inter, Fraunces, Oswald, Manrope, Playfair Display, Anton, Bebas Neue, Space Grotesk, DM Serif Display) — never a CDN/Google font outside engine/fonts.ts.
